properly, kind, i.e. (religiously) pious (a saint)

properly, to glitter from afar, i.e. to be eminent (as a superintendent, especially of the Temple services and its music); to be permanent

עוֹלָם — "eternal" / "everlasting" / "age-long." Like Greek αἰώνιος, debate centers on whether this is absolute timelessness or the span of an era.
